modeling_constraints: Use deterministic Spectre-compatible analog state for the running maximum.
Use voltage-domain output behavior without an undeclared reset.
Do not implement a follower, minimum detector, final-sample detector, current contribution, or validation-only hook.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: At simulation start, the held output is initialized from the input rather than from a fixed rail.
Whenever vin exceeds every previously observed value, vout updates to that new maximum.
When vin falls below the held maximum, vout retains the previously captured maximum.
Across transient operation, vout is monotone nondecreasing.
At each observation time, vout equals the maximum vin value observed from simulation start through that time.

title: Max Detector Hold
